lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖਿ ਵਿਖਾਲਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੬॥੨੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai ghatt antar aape vekh vikhaalaniaa |8|26|27|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam, the Name of the Lord, abides deep within the hearts of those who see the Lord themselves, and inspire others to see Him as well. ||8||26||27||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਵਿਖਾਲੇ ਸੁ ਵੇਖੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jis aap vikhaale su vekhai koee |
lines.english: How rare are those who behold Him. He causes Himself to be seen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਊਚਾ ਊਚੋ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: aape aoochaa aoocho hoee |
lines.english: He Himself is the Highest of the High.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh bharapoor rahiaa sabh thaaee |
lines.english: My God is pervading and permeating all places.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਰੇਵੀ ਇਕ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sadaa sarevee ik man dhiaaee guramukh sach samaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: I serve Him constantly, and I meditate on Him single-mindedly. As Gurmukh, I am absorbed in the True One. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ghar hee meh paaee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I have found Him within the home of my own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jagajeevan nirbhau daataa guramat sehaj samaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, I merge with intuitive ease into the Lord, the Life of the World, the Fearless One, the Great Giver. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree jagajeevan man vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Lord, the Life of the World, within their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਬਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hee meh preetam sadaa hai baalaa |
lines.english: Within the home of the self is the Eternally Young Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮਹਿ ਧਰਤੀ ਧਉਲੁ ਪਾਤਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghar meh dharatee dhaul paataalaa |
lines.english: Within the home of the self is the earth, its support and the nether regions of the underworld.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਚੂਕੈ ਫੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maran na chookai feraa |
lines.english: the cycle of birth and death does not end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa andar haumai meraa |
lines.english: When the body is filled with ego and selfishness,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦਿ ਰਹੈ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sadaa anand rahai sukhadaataa guramat sehaj samaavaniaa |2|
lines.english: The Giver of peace is eternally blissful. Through the Guru's Teachings, we are absorbed in intuitive peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰੇ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su haumai maare sacho sach dhiaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh subdues egotism, and meditates on the Truest of the True. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਇਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਦੁਇ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kaaeaa andar paap pun due bhaaee |
lines.english: Within this body are the two brothers, sin and virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਵੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਇਕਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: dovai maar jaae ikat ghar aavai guramat sehaj samaavaniaa |4|
lines.english: Subduing both, and entering into the Home of the One, through the Guru's Teachings, we are absorbed in intuitive peace. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਹੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਕੈ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਉਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: duhee mil kai srisatt upaaee |
lines.english: When the two joined together, the Universe was produced.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਅਨੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghar hee maeh doojai bhaae aneraa |
lines.english: Within the home of the self is the darkness of the love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਗਟੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: paragatt sabad hai sukhadaataa anadin naam dhiaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: The Giver of peace is revealed through the Shabad, meditating upon the Naam, night and day. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਨਣੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਛੋਡੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: chaanan hovai chhoddai haumai meraa |
lines.english: When the Divine Light dawns, ego and selfishness are dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar jot paragatt paasaaraa |
lines.english: Deep within the self is the Light of God; It radiates throughout the expanse of His creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਾਖੀ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur saakhee mittiaa andhiaaraa |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the darkness of spiritual ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਲੁ ਬਿਗਾਸਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: kamal bigaas sadaa sukh paaeaa jotee jot milaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The heart-lotus blossoms forth, and eternal peace is obtained, as one's light merges into the Light. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਮਹਲ ਰਤਨੀ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: andar mehal ratanee bhare bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: Within the mansion is the treasure house, overflowing with jewels.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਣਜੇ ਸਦਾ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh vanaje sadaa vaapaaree laahaa naam sad paavaniaa |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh, the trader, always purchases the merchandise of the Naam, and always reaps profits. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh paae naam apaaraa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh obtains the Infinite Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਣਜਹਿ ਕੇਈ ਕੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh vanajeh keee kee |
lines.english: Rare is that Gurmukh who trades in this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਸੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੨੭॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: naanak jis nadar kare so paae kar kirapaa man vasaavaniaa |8|27|28|
lines.english: O Nanak, those upon whom the Lord casts His Glance of Grace, obtain it. Through His Mercy, it is enshrined in the mind. ||8||27||28||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵਥੁ ਰਾਖੈ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape vath raakhai aape dee |
lines.english: The Lord Himself keeps this merchandise in stock, and He Himself distributes it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maajh, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਭਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad bhaau doojaa jaae |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the love of duality is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲੇ ਸੇਵ ਕਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har aape mele sev karaae |
lines.english: The Lord Himself leads us to merge with Him and serve Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਦਾ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har niramal sadaa gunadaataa har gun meh aap samaavaniaa |1|
lines.english: The Immaculate Lord is the Bestower of eternal virtue. The Lord Himself leads us to merge in His Virtuous Goodness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਹੈ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa naam sadaa hai niramal gurasabadee man vasaavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Name is eternally pure and immaculate. Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it is enshrined within the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਸਚੁ ਸਚਾ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree sach sachaa hiradai vasaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who enshrine the Truest of the True within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਦਾ ਜਨ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: amrit naam sadaa jan soheh guramat har ras paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Those humble beings look beautiful forever in the Ambrosial Naam. Through the Guru's Teachings, they receive the sublime essence of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕਰਮਿ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape gur daataa karam bidhaataa |
lines.english: The Guru Himself is the Giver, the Architect of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵਕ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: sevak seveh guramukh har jaataa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh, the humble servant who serves the Lord, comes to know Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਗੁਫਾ ਮਹਿ ਇਕੁ ਥਾਨੁ ਸੁਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eis gufaa meh ik thaan suhaaeaa |
lines.english: Within the cave of this body, there is one beautiful place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anadin naam salaahan rang raate gur kirapaa te paavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Night and day, praise the Naam, the Name of the Lord; imbued with the Lord's Love, by Guru's Grace, you shall find Him. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਭਰਮੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: poorai gur haumai bharam chukaaeaa |
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, ego and doubt are dispelled.
